privileged_info_summary: The task requires implementing the Command design pattern for an IntelliJ IDEA Java project using Maven with Java 17. The project directory is /home/ga/IdeaProjects/undo-redo-app. Five command classes (Command interface, InsertCommand, DeleteCommand, ReplaceCommand, CommandHistory) must be created in the com.editor.command package, plus completion of Main.java in com.editor package. A TextEditor base class is provided with insert(), delete(), replace(), and getText() methods. Program output demonstrating undo/redo operations must be written to output.txt in the project root. All metadata values in task.json are verified as accurate and consistent with the setup and verification scripts.
